reviewer_verdict: The reviewer rates AspenClean 9/10 as one of only 8 cleaning brands (of 21 audited) to pass a zero-tolerance ingredient screen, citing its EWG Verified status and glucoside-based formulation as an alternative to detergents like Tide PODS Free & Gentle, which the reviewer found still contains ethoxylated surfactants, a PEG compound, and an optical brightener despite fragrance-free marketing.

claims.claim: AspenClean's glucoside-based surfactant formulation is EWG Verified and avoids the MIT/BIT preservatives the reviewer links to aquatic toxicity, which caused 13 of 21 competing 'natural' brands to fail the reviewer's screen

people_supply_chain.gap_note: No labor or supply-chain sourcing information was given for this product beyond the company being founded in Vancouver in 2004.

quality.gap_note: No cleaning-performance/efficacy testing was provided for this specific product; the assessment is based entirely on ingredient and certification screening, not use performance.

claims.claim: AspenClean's full product line costs roughly $20-30/month for a family of four, per the reviewer's cost breakdown of the passing cleaning brands

First cleaning company to receive EWG Verified certification, and holds 21 EWG Verified products rating EWG A across its line, following the reviewer's zero-tolerance ingredient audit that failed 13 of 21 competing 'natural' cleaning brands for undisclosed preservatives (MIT/BIT) and ethoxylated surfactants

notable_signals: Reviewer applies an explicit certification hierarchy (MADE SAFE > EWG Verified > EPA Safer Choice > EWG A-F product-level ratings > brand self-claims) — a reusable framework ClearCart could adopt for scoring any personal-care/cleaning product's certification credibility.
Reviewer discloses affiliate-revenue and funding conflicts of interest in a third-party data source (EWG) it relies on, rather than citing EWG uncritically — a transparency practice worth crediting.

attribution.reviewer: Clarity Insight Advisory (Buy Better With Brian)
attribution.note: Assessment derived from this reviewer's published work; see review_url for their full analysis.
